title: clematis orientalis var. vulgaris
intro: Clematis orientalis var. vulgaris, also known as the Oriental Clematis or Manchu Clematis, is a perennial flowering plant native to China and Japan. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion, as well as possessing antimicrobial and antiviral properties. In herbal preparations, Clematis orientalis var. vulgaris is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of ailments, including respiratory issues and skin conditions.
